_comment: VS Code tasks template for Ollama no-think proxy lifecycle management.
_usage: Merge the tasks in this file into your repo's .vscode/tasks.json.

tasks._comment: Auto-start task — runs on folder open. Skips start if proxy is already on port 11435.
tasks.label: Start Ollama No-Think Proxy On Folder Open
args: $portInUse = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalAddress 127.0.0.1 -LocalPort 11435 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $portInUse) { $wd = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $script = Join-Path $wd 'tools\ollama-nothink-proxy.js'; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath 'node' -ArgumentList @($script) -WorkingDirectory $wd }

tasks._comment: Manual start task — use when the proxy has been killed and needs to be restarted.
tasks.label: Start Ollama No-Think Proxy

tasks._comment: Log viewer — tails the proxy log in real time. Runs as a background task.
tasks.label: Show Ollama No-Think Proxy Log
